name: Dark Rolotia
title: Corrupted Sorceress of Time
description:
"Come on, gimme more sweets! If you don't...I'll throw a tantrum!"
Once again, Chronos holds her head in her hands, terrorized by the little devil that has taken up residence in the Temple of Time.

localization.name: Magical Barrage
localization.description:
200% damage to all enemies. If an enemy is poisoned or sleeping, deals 400% damage instead. Allies gain 1 Spirit for each poisoned and sleeping enemy hit. If no enemies are poisoned or sleeping already, each enemy hit is randomly granted either the Cursed Sleep status effect for 200TU or the Lethal Poison status effect for 999TU. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the targets from being defeated, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

Cursed Sleep will overwrite status effects other than Burn, cannot be overwritten by Poison, can be applied repeatedly to units that have already slept while on the battlefield, and will not end from damage caused by Dream Hunter type active skills. Lethal Poison will overwrite other status effects, cannot be overwritten by status effects other than Burn or Stealth, and cannot be Purified. Lethal Poison deals 2 times the damage of normal Poison and ignores passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, other than those which specifically prevent defeat from Poison or non-attack damage. Lethal Poison cannot apply to Burning units or Boss units.
localization.selected:
200%+ damage, may spread Sleep or Poison
(Will overwrite other status effects)

localization.name: Dark Shroud
localization.description:
All non-burning allies will have the TU costs for all of their skills reduced by 20%. This will overwrite the effects of other Quicken skills on affected units. Then grants all allies Stealth, a Stealth Shield, a random ward (either Poison, Stun, or Sleep), and heals them for 500% of the user's attack. This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use.

Stealth will overwrite other Status effects on affected units. Stealth Shields prevent the next non-stealth status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth.
localization.selected:
Grants Stealth, Shields and a Random Ward.
(Will overwrite other status effects)

localization.name: Rewind Time
localization.description: Removes all Poison and Sleep wards from enemy units on the battlefield. Then pulls the user away from the battlefield to be next in line of your reinforcements. If there are no ally reinforcements, adds enough Super Chimori's to the ally team to still pull the user away to reinforcements (max 4 if the user is alone on the battlefield). Usable if the user has defeated 1+ units with attacks while on the battlefield.
localization.selected: Sends user to be next in reinforcements

localization.name: Magical Ruin
localization.description: 600% damage to 2 enemies if they are sleeping or poisoned. 800% damage instead to targets that have the Cursed Sleep or Lethal Poison status effects. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects, and heals the user for 100% of total damage dealt. All non-burning, non-poisoned, non-sleeping enemies hit are then randomly granted either Cursed Sleep for 200TU or Lethal Poison for 999TU.
localization.selected:
50%+ damage, may spread Sleep or Poison
(Will overwrite other status effects)

localization.name: Dark Timeline
localization.description:
This unit's attacks will not wake sleeping enemies. Each time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will heal for 30% of its max HP.

Until the end of this unit's third turn while on the battlefield:
- This unit is immune to Poison and Sleep status effects.
- This unit is immune to Stun effects unless it is burning.
- Unless it is burning, this unit has 80% damage reduction and has a 60% chance, plus 10% chance per Awakening (up to 100% if this unit has 4 Awakenings) to survive any damage that would defeat it with 1HP.

Until the end of this unit's second turn while on the battlefield, each time this unit takes damage from an attack, a random non-burning enemy is immediately granted Cursed Sleep for 200TU, then a random non-burning enemy immediately becomes Lethal Poisoned for 999TU. This is not a Skin passive skill.

localization.name: Time Warp
localization.description:
Triggered when this unit enters the battlefield from the allied reinforcements:
- Until the end of this unit's first turn while on the battlefield, this unit will become a Guardian.
- All allies are Purified (any negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed).
- All other allies that are at max HP have their TUs reduced to 0. This has no effect on allies that are either Fire element or have Burn Blast or Burn Drive type active skills. These extra turns may be interrupted by other effects that influence the turn order (e.g. stuns targeting the lowest TU target). Active skills that grant turns cannot be used by any affected units until after they have had the turn.

After each enemy turn, a random sleeping or poisoned ally will have their Sleep or Poison (including Lethal Poison) removed and be granted a ward for the effect removed (a Poison Ward or Sleep Ward).

Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack. While this unit is a Guardian, for any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, this unit has a 100% chance to redirect 1 hit to itself instead. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: G.sword Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by units equipped with Greatswords.

localization.name: Greataxe Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Greataxes in addition to their original preferred weapon type.
